# IconSecurity.RequiredImageTypes property

The MIME types a consumer MUST support when rendering icons (R-14.2-l, AC-20.19). Includes the `image/jpg` spelling alongside the canonical `image/jpeg` for interoperability.

```csharp
public static IReadOnlySet<string> RequiredImageTypes { get; }
```
